payload.source_text: High Level Description
The pocket money tracker system allows children to claim pocket money tasks as they are completed throughout the week.
Parents can detail tasks that should be completed and the monetary amount earned for that task.
As a task is completed it is linked to the child that completed it.
The children should be able to see the available tasks and the tasks they have completed that week.
At the end of each week the children can see the total amount they have earned that week.
The Parents can also see a report of how much each child has earned and the tasks they completed so that they can provide the pocket money earned to each child.
At the start of the next week all tasks become available again to be claimed.
Historical task data shall be available.
The resulting system shall be able to operate on iOS 16, Android 9 and Windows 11 or later.

payload.name: Participant Stewardship
payload.description: Enterprise accountability for defining and maintaining the roles, relationships, and responsibilities of family members who participate in the household economic system, establishing clear boundaries of authority and entitlement.

payload.name: Work-Reward Obligation Framework
payload.description: Enterprise commitment to establishing and governing the relationship between defined work units and their corresponding monetary entitlements, including the rules for defining, claiming, and fulfilling these obligations.

payload.name: Financial Disbursement Accountability
payload.description: Enterprise responsibility for accurate calculation, transparent reporting, and timely transfer of earned monetary entitlements according to established performance records and periodic settlement cycles.

payload.name: Transparency and Information Stewardship
payload.description: Enterprise obligation to provide participants with visibility into available opportunities, current status of commitments, and financial positions to enable informed participation and decision-making within the system.

payload.name: Historical Record Accountability
payload.description: Enterprise duty to maintain persistent, auditable records of all completed obligations and financial transactions, ensuring long-term accountability, dispute resolution capability, and institutional memory.

payload.name: Task Stewardship
payload.description: Business responsibility for defining, governing, and maintaining the lifecycle of work obligations that children may undertake for compensation, including establishment of value, completion criteria, and recurring availability patterns.

payload.name: Child Participation Entitlement
payload.description: Business responsibility for enabling children to engage with available work obligations, claim those they will perform, execute them, and establish their entitlement to compensation through demonstrated completion.

payload.name: Earnings Accountability
payload.description: Business responsibility for determining, accumulating, and reporting the monetary obligations owed to participants based on their completed work within defined temporal boundaries, enabling settlement fulfillment.

payload.name: Parental Oversight
payload.description: Business responsibility for providing visibility into child participation patterns, completion achievements, and fulfillment obligations to enable informed parental governance and payment execution.

payload.name: Historical Record Stewardship
payload.description: Business responsibility for preserving evidence of past task definitions, participation events, and completion outcomes across temporal boundaries to support accountability, pattern analysis, and governance continuity.

payload.name: Temporal Aggregation Logic
payload.description: Logical derivation behavior that aggregates earnings data within weekly temporal boundaries. Defines how earnings values are logically accumulated and bounded by time cycles without prescribing calculation algorithms or reporting mechanisms.

payload.name: Task Lifecycle State Model
payload.description: Logical state transitions governing task availability and the temporal retention policy for historical task records. Defines how tasks move through availability states and when historical data is logically preserved, triggered by weekly cycle boundaries.

payload.name: Task Completion Entity Model
payload.description: Logical structure defining the core completion entity and its associated child entities, including the identity, attributes, and containment relationships that represent a task completion occurrence within the system's logical boundary.

payload.name: Completion History Association Model
payload.description: Logical relationship model governing how completion occurrences are linked to their historical counterparts and task references, defining the traceability structure between active and archived completion records.

payload.name: Deployment Platform Requirements
payload.description: Physical constraints governing the baseline platform specifications and compatibility thresholds that deployment infrastructure must satisfy to support system operation.

payload.name: Multi-Platform Deployment Specification
payload.description: Detailed deployment node specifications for iOS mobile and Windows desktop platform configurations, including exact platform versions, runtime parameters, and device-specific deployment settings required for cross-platform application distribution.

payload.name: Child User Interface Specification
payload.description: Detailed interface specifications for child user interactions, including precise UI component definitions for task claim operations, weekly task visibility scope configuration, and child-specific interaction patterns and screen layouts.

payload.name: Parent User Interface Specification
payload.description: Detailed interface specifications for parent user interactions, including precise UI component definitions for task definition workflows, monetary assignment interfaces, reporting dashboard layouts, disbursement operation controls, and end-of-week notification configurations.

payload.name: authentication credentials
payload.description: The system shall persist Child entity records in a relational database table with columns for child identity, authentication credentials, and parental association.

payload.name: task access control policy
payload.description: The system shall implement row-level access control policies on the Task table that restrict child-role queries to records with status equal to 'available'.

payload.name: household
payload.description: The system shall implement row-level access control policies on the Task table that restrict parent-role queries to records matching the authenticated parent's household identifier.

payload.name: task identifier
payload.description: The system shall persist Task entity records in a relational database table with columns for task identifier, lifecycle state, and household identifier.

payload.name: task definition relationship
payload.description: The Task table shall include a foreign-key column referencing the Parent table to represent the definition relationship.

payload.name: parent-child governance relationship
payload.description: The API gateway shall enforce parent-child governance relationships through an access control filter component.

value_set: Parent users cannot retrieve earnings data for children not under their governance.

payload.name: payment fulfillment system
payload.description: The system shall expose earnings amounts to external payment fulfillment systems via a payment API integration interface.

payload.name: task state eligibility rule
payload.description: The system shall implement server-side validation logic to enforce task state eligibility rules.

payload.name: task execution service
payload.description: The system shall implement a scheduled task execution service to trigger state transitions at weekly intervals.

payload.name: operating system version
payload.description: The system shall be deployed on infrastructure that meets the minimum operating system version specified for compatibility.

value_set: iOS version >= 15.0
Windows version >= 10.0.22000

payload.name: earnings report
payload.description: The iOS mobile application UI shall render a parent earnings report view displaying derived child earnings values formatted as currency strings with two decimal places for the authenticated parent user.

payload.surface_term: task history source task completion id

payload.name: child created at
payload.description: The child table shall be defined in the relational database schema with columns child_id (PRIMARY KEY, BIGINT), parent_id (BIGINT, FOREIGN KEY), display_name (VARCHAR(100)), and created_at (TIMESTAMP).

payload.name: message
payload.description: The parent user interface component subscription handler shall process incoming messages containing child_id, task_id, and claimed_at timestamp fields.

payload.name: state transition API endpoint
payload.description: The scheduled task execution service shall invoke the state transition API endpoint POST /api/v1/tasks/{task_id}/transition with target_state='expired' for each matching task.

payload.name: task count
payload.description: The parent user interface component shall display child name, task count, and total monetary value fields for each aggregated completion event.

payload.name: task REST endpoint
payload.description: The child user interface component shall invoke the available tasks REST endpoint using HTTP GET.

payload.name: task description
payload.description: The child user interface component shall display each task's description, completion timestamp in ISO 8601 format, and monetary value.

payload.name: task definition form
payload.description: The parent user interface component shall provide a task definition form containing input fields for description (text), value (decimal), and recurrence_pattern (dropdown).

payload.name: task definition REST endpoint
payload.description: The parent user interface component shall provide a Submit button that invokes HTTP POST to the task definition REST endpoint.

payload.name: scheduled deletion process
payload.description: The system shall execute a scheduled deletion process implemented as a daily cron job with schedule expression '0 2 * * *' to DELETE task_history records where retention_until < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP.

payload.name: task definition recurrence pattern
payload.description: The task_definition table schema shall include columns: id (SERIAL PRIMARY KEY), parent_user_id (INTEGER NOT NULL), description (TEXT NOT NULL), value (DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL), recurrence_pattern (VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL), created_at (TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP).

payload.name: task definition created at
payload.description: The task_definition table schema shall include columns: id (SERIAL PRIMARY KEY), parent_user_id (INTEGER NOT NULL), description (TEXT NOT NULL), value (DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL), recurrence_pattern (VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL), created_at (TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP).

payload.name: database transaction
payload.description: The historical task copy operation shall execute within a single database transaction that also encompasses the task state attribute update.

payload.name: iOS platform
payload.description: The system shall be deployed on iOS platform nodes.

value_set: iOS version >= 14.0
Windows version >= 10.0.18363

payload.name: child attribute
payload.description: The rule engine component shall evaluate each eligibility condition by comparing child attribute values against condition threshold expressions using a left-to-right operator precedence parser.

payload.name: condition threshold expression
payload.description: The rule engine component shall evaluate each eligibility condition by comparing child attribute values against condition threshold expressions using a left-to-right operator precedence parser.

payload.name: family timezone
payload.description: The system shall calculate weekly boundaries by converting the completed_at timestamp to the configured family timezone before extracting the week start date.

payload.name: range query
payload.description: The task_archive table index on completion_date shall support range queries with query execution time under 100ms for date ranges spanning up to 90 days.

payload.name: currency metadata
payload.description: The system shall store currency metadata in the currency_code column as a 3-character ISO 4217 currency code.

payload.name: family base currency
payload.description: The aggregation service shall convert all reward amounts to the family base currency using the exchange rate valid at the completion timestamp before summing.

payload.name: exchange rate
payload.description: The aggregation service shall convert all reward amounts to the family base currency using the exchange rate valid at the completion timestamp before summing.

payload.name: earnings endpoint
payload.description: The system shall expose a GET /api/v1/earnings/{child_id}/weekly endpoint that returns earnings data in JSON format.

payload.name: earnings API response
payload.description: The earnings API response shall include a JSON object with fields: child_id, week_start_date, week_end_date, total_amount, currency_code, and tasks array.

payload.name: user
payload.description: The access control middleware shall return HTTP 403 Forbidden with error code 'INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS' when the authenticated user lacks parent association with the requested child.

payload.name: system
payload.description: The system shall deploy to iOS mobile platform nodes.

payload.name: task visibility scope
payload.description: The child user interface shall restrict task visibility scope to tasks within the current weekly period for the child user role.

payload.name: task definition operation
payload.description: The parent user interface shall provide an actor component that enables task definition operations.

payload.name: child notification
payload.description: The parent user interface shall implement an end-of-week reporting trigger that initiates child notification.

payload.name: Task table
payload.description: The Task table shall define a status column of type VARCHAR(20) with values constrained to the enumeration {'Pending', 'Claimed', 'Completed', 'Approved', 'Rejected'}.

payload.name: child-scoped operation
payload.description: The API gateway shall implement an access control filter that executes a SQL query verifying EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM ParentChild WHERE parent_id = <authenticated_parent_id> AND child_id = <request_child_id>) before authorizing child-scoped operations.

value_set: API requests targeting child entities return HTTP 403 when the authenticated parent lacks a ParentChild relationship record.

payload.surface_term: payment API integration interface earnings endpoint

payload.name: database schema
payload.description: The database schema shall define a Child table with child_id (INT PRIMARY KEY) and a Task table with task_id (INT PRIMARY KEY) and parent_id (INT NOT NULL FOREIGN KEY REFERENCES Parent(parent_id)), establishing a one-to-many relationship from Parent to Task.

payload.name: from status
payload.description: The system shall persist task state transitions in a TaskStateHistory table with columns: history_id (INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT), task_id (INT NOT NULL FOREIGN KEY), from_status (VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL), to_status (VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL), transition_timestamp (DATETIME NOT NULL), and enforce ACID transaction isolation level READ COMMITTED for all INSERT operations.

payload.name: status update request
payload.description: The server-side validation component shall execute a validation function that returns false and error code 'INVALID_STATE_TRANSITION' when a status update request specifies from_status = 'Completed' AND to_status IN ('Pending', 'Claimed').
